text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Home Based Parenting Education * TANF Recipients 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community At Risk Families Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Domestic Violence Issues Ex-Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community TANF Recipients Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIFEWORKS NW LIFEWORKS NW KING PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Family and Community Alliance (FCA) and Family Support and Connections (FSC) provide home-based parent education, advocacy, and connection to community resources. 3716 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 283-4776 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWORKS NW PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT
